examples: They began innocuously: "Would you like to be famous?"
The piece starts out innocuously enough, with an almost sultry little snake dance.
I'm assuming this is the natural progression of a trend that began innocuously enough as a revival in smart patent bags, shoes and what used to be called "small leather goods".
One of them combines painting and collage to create innocuously pretty abstractions that would make attractive wrapping paper.
Mr Sharif's friends manage to make the amendment sound innocuously progressive.
